title: Labour & Employment
content:
Sophisticated solutions from a national team at the forefront of federal and provincial labour law.
Across the country, our lawyers are recognized for their leadership in labour and employment law. You benefit from the full-scope of resources and experience in all areas of practice for responsive advice and practical support. We also offer fair and innovative pricing solutions to meet the needs of clients across all sectors.
In this section you'll find our service offerings in the following areas:
- Pay & Employment Equity
- Pensions, Benefits, and Executive Compensation

### Subscribe to the McCarthy Tétrault Employer Advisor Blog
Keeping employers up to date on labour and employment law developments in Canada

### Cross-Border – Navigating Canadian Employment Law Guidebook
This Guidebook is designed to provide general information on Canada’s labor and employment laws. This Guidebook does not provide legal advice on specific issues. You are encouraged to consult with legal counsel should you require assistance in addressing a particular issue or concern.
